entity.summary: Interconnected cryptocurrency exchange network and white-label trading platform launched in December 2018. Birake shares orders and liquidity across participating branded exchanges through a common trading network and currently offers exchange software, listings, wallets, trading, and account services. The current operator identifies itself as Birake Exchange LLC in Georgia.
entity.notes: Launch is stored at month precision from exchange profiles identifying a December 2018 launch. Early sources describe an Estonia-based project, while current legal and policy pages identify Birake Exchange LLC in Georgia. HEI records both lifecycle jurisdictions rather than forcing a single origin. Birake is modeled as a DEX-style exchange network because its own materials describe a decentralized trade engine and shared order network, even though identity, KYC, and some infrastructure are centrally coordinated.

events.title: Birake exchange network launched
events.description: Birake launched in December 2018 as an interconnected exchange and shared-order trading network.
events.notes: Month-level marker from current exchange-directory history.

evidence.title: Birake Exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies Birake as launched in December 2018 and historically based in Estonia.

evidence.title: Birake exchange network and software platform
evidence.notes: Official site describes the interconnected exchange network, shared order book, DEX trade engine, wallets, listings, and current live platform.

evidence.title: Birake terms and operator identity
evidence.notes: Official terms identify Birake Exchange LLC in Georgia as operator of the platform and services.

evidence.title: Birake exchange risk statement
evidence.notes: Current official risk statement identifies Birake Exchange LLC as operator of the exchange platform.

evidence.title: Birake exchange fees
evidence.notes: Current official fee page supports ongoing exchange-service operation.
